philosophy.subtitle: The Fifth Element
philosophy.desc1: In ancient philosophy, Aether was considered the fifth element—the absolute medium that fills the universe and transmits light. Just as modern science posits invisible energy to explain the order and gravity of the cosmos, Aether is the essential medium that connects all things and transmits energy.
philosophy.desc2: Aethemar originates from this grand concept. We are not just an agency; we aim to be the 'most powerful invisible medium' that helps your brand's unique light and potential reach everywhere. Through AI technology, the modern Aether, we create limitless connections and growth.
philosophy.desc3: A name born by adding the strategic edge of Marketing to the infinite expandability of Aether: Aethemar. Just as light traverses the universe, we design an unparalleled path for your brand to shine brilliantly at the center of the world using the most innovative technologies and sharp insights.

ceo.name: Lee Heekyung
short_intro: Appeared on multiple SBS broadcasts with the title of Beauty Power Blogger.
As a YouTube planner, grew a former employer's (medical clinic) channel to 20,000 subscribers in a short period.
Acted as a promotional ambassador and marketer for various brands as a beauty influencer.

As a content creator and marketing planning team leader, simultaneously utilized various SNS such as Instagram, YouTube, and Naver Blog for promotion, and closely followed the latest algorithm trends for each channel.
As a former practicing real estate broker in the Gangnam area, possesses excellent communication skills and sociability.
ceo.desc: Bridging the analytical rigor of artificial intelligence with the creative intuition of high-end marketing. With a distinguished career as an in-house marketing director for leading hospitals and premier law firms, Lee Heekyung brings unparalleled expertise in navigating complex, trust-based industries.
ceo.mastery_desc: Strategic growth for medical and legal sectors.
ceo.media_desc: Recognized authority with multiple broadcast appearances.

experience.desc: Directed omni-channel marketing strategies and managed external agencies for top-tier law firms and hospitals.
details: Overall management of online and offline marketing strategies
Planned and operated YouTube channels (e.g., reached 20,000 subscribers in a short period)
Managed official blogs and SNS, executed paid advertising campaigns (SA)
Competitor analysis and brand identity development
Conducted primary client consultations and authored professional articles

experience.desc: Produced promotional property videos and managed inbound real estate sales and client briefings.
details: Produced property promotional videos (filming, editing, scripting, and narration)
Conducted client property briefings and comprehensive home tours
Managed site visits, inbound client sales, and phone consultations

experience.desc: Managed government research projects and authored internal magazine columns.
details: Executed government research projects (drafting business plans and official documents)
Authored columns for the internal magazine

sns_list.title: YouTube (Real Estate & Law): 'Sister Who Buys Apartments'
sns_list.desc: Independently managed video shooting and planning. Created thumbnails and channel art using design tools. Established viewership growth strategies based on the YouTube algorithm.

activities.title: SBS Stargram & Broadcast Appearances
activities.desc: Demonstrated public communication skills through multiple appearances as a beauty power blogger panelist and broadcast model.

activities.title: LG Household & Health Care Global Marketer
activities.desc: Planned and produced online promotional content for K-Beauty brands, executing innovative fusion marketing ideas.

activities.title: Class101 YouTube Channel Planning Course
activities.desc: Completed practical YouTube marketing courses covering content planning, algorithm analysis, and scriptwriting.

activities.title: Cornell University Overseas Program
activities.desc: Invited to Cornell University to plan global research projects and deliver English presentations.

intro_stories.title: Flexible Creative Approach
intro_stories.desc: Proposing innovative, boundary-breaking concepts that demonstrate exceptional creativity. We create limitless results with a flexible mindset that refuses to be boxed in.

intro_stories.title: Planning that Amplifies Value
intro_stories.desc: Driven by client feedback, we pioneer new services and lead explosive growth through multilingual marketing that even secures major broadcast sponsorships.

intro_stories.title: Heart-Opening Communication
intro_stories.desc: Honed through extensive extracurricular and broadcast panel experiences, we possess the power of articulation and active listening to truly engage others.

intro_stories.title: Execution Beyond the Challenge
intro_stories.desc: In times of crisis, a challenging spirit and teamwork shine brightest. We never give up, breaking through limitations with a positive mindset to lead projects to success.

services.title: Our Capabilities
services.subtitle: Precision engineering meets limitless creativity. We architect digital dominance.
services.card1_desc: Data-driven marketing architectures designed for elite conversion. We don't just run campaigns; we build self-sustaining ecosystems of brand authority.
services.card2_desc: Bespoke application and web development tailored for scale. We engineer digital products that serve as the technological backbone of your enterprise.
services.card3_desc: We produce high-end brand commercial videos that transcend physical limits using cutting-edge generative AI models.
